title: Score for Relevance
shortDescription: Score this page (or every link on a listing) for relevance to your interests.

form.label: What are you looking for?
form.help: Describe your platform, project, or interest. The agent judges relevance against this text.
form.placeholder: e.g. I'm building a macOS app platform that lets users author mini-apps, agents, and pipelines. I care about LLM tool use, on-device inference, and agentic workflows.

form.label: Deep-dive threshold
form.help: When scanning a listing page, only items scoring at or above this get a full-content deep dive (otherwise the short-pass score is the final answer).

singlePage.system: You are a strict relevance-scoring engine. Output ONE JSON object with keys: score (integer 0-100), reason (one short sentence, max 25 words), keyConnections (array of up to 3 short strings, each <= 8 words, naming the specific overlaps with the user's interest). No prose outside the JSON. No markdown. No code fences. No leading/trailing whitespace.

listingShortPass.system: You are a strict relevance-scoring engine. Output ONE JSON object with keys: score (integer 0-100) and reason (one short sentence, max 20 words). No prose outside the JSON. No markdown. No code fences.
